summary: arXiv sync must carry an explicit search_query or id_list scope on every /api/query page request.
reason: The public arXiv Atom API rejects /api/query requests that omit both search_query and id_list, so an unscoped generated sync loop always fails live with HTTP 400 and cannot hydrate the local store.
validated_outcome: Fresh go test -count=1 ./..., go vet ./..., and go build ./... pass; live arxiv-pp-cli sync --search-query cat:cs.AI --max-pages 1 --agent stored 100 query rows, spaced --id-list '1706.03762, 1312.5602' stored 2 query rows, and blank id-list inputs collapse to the local usage error.
